/usr/bin/c++ -static CMakeFiles/reax_tools.dir/src/atom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reax_tools.dir/src/cell_list.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reax_tools.dir/src/defines.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reax_tools.dir/src/getopt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reax_tools.dir/src/load_files.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reax_tools.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reax_tools.dir/src/molecule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reax_tools.dir/src/reax_flow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reax_tools.dir/src/reax_species.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reax_tools.dir/src/reax_topo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reax_tools.dir/src/string_tools.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reax_tools.dir/src/system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reax_tools.dir/src/universe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reax_tools.dir/src/vec_algorithms.cpp.o -o reax_tools  external/fmt/libfmt.a
